effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: Even amid heavy incoming fire, the crew of a kinhost’s lighter vehicles can make rapid manoeuvres to exploit sudden openings.

target.en: One **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, can only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: Once prizes have been seized, the Kin focus their efforts upon maximising their control and respond with redoubled fury to attempts to loosen their grip.

target.en: One **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one friendly **KAPRICUS** or **SAGITAUR** unit within 6" of your **INFANTRY** unit. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, you can select one friendly **HEKATON LAND FORTRESS** unit within 6" of your **INFANTRY** unit instead. The selected unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase. When doing so, models in the selected unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

fluff.en: With a narrow‑band data burst, those of an oathband who have been wronged can call in the devastating vengeance of their armoured support.

target.en: That **BRÔKHYR**, **IRONKIN STEELJACKS** or **ARKANYST EVALUATOR** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after a **BRÔKHYR**, **IRONKIN STEELJACKS** or **ARKANYST EVALUATOR** unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time that enemy unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

fluff.en: Exotic munitions can seed enemy lines with slow‑release death, stalling those who neutralise the threat while ravaging any who push on.

target.en: One **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Between their resilient armour and technology and their capacity to stoically endure pain and suffering, the Kin can weather devastating attacks.

target.en: One **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: The Fight phase

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP during this usage of this Stratagem, you can re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

fluff.en: By expending energy reserves, the Kin’s close‑quarter weapons thrum with forgewrought power. The allotment of such resources sees their wielders determined to make every blow strike true.

target.en: One **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP during this usage of this Stratagem, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1 instead.

fluff.en: Confident their use will turn the tide, the Kin draw on personal caches of munitions, power cells bearing the signatures of acclaimed Brôkhyr or heirloom augurs to unleash a potent fusillade into the foe.

target.en: That **LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after a **LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE** unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

fluff.en: Using specialised beam emission signatures, multispectral ammunition, or broadcasting targeting data, the gunnery crews of Kin war engines can signify priority targets for their comrades.

target.en: That <k>Hernkyn</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ヘルンキン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Hernkyn unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Hernkyn-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Hernkyn amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité Hernkog amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Confratelli di Caccia amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方ヘルンキン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 헤른킨 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方远行者单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Lethal Hits]</k>.
effect.de: Die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben <k>[Tödliche Treffer]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Impactos letales]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Touches Fatales]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>Colpi Letali</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［会心ヒット］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[致命一击]</k>。

fluff.en: Knowing the burden of responsibility placed upon them by Kindred and Ancestors, Hernkyn focus on their marksmanship with a stern determination that makes every shot count.
fluff.de: Die Hernkyn wissen um die Last der Verantwortung, die ihnen von Sippe und Ahnen anvertraut wurde, und fokussieren ihre Schießkunst mit solch grimmiger Entschlossenheit, dass jeder Schuss zählt.
fluff.es: Conscientes de la responsabilidad que la Familia y los Ancestros les imponen, los Hernkyn concentran su puntería con la más férrea determinación para hacee que cada disparo cuente.
fluff.fr: Sous le poids des responsabilités placées sur eux par la Cognation et les Ancêtres, les Hernkogs concentrent leur visée pour veiller à ce que chaque tir soit décisif.
fluff.it: Consapevoli del fardello a loro affidato dalla Famiglia e dagli Avi, i Confratelli di Caccia si concentrano sul proprio compito con austera determinazione, in modo da massimizzare ogni colpo.
fluff.ja: 閥族や父祖より課せられた責務の重みを知るヘルンキンは、厳然たる決意をもって射撃に集中し、一撃一撃を確実に成果へと結びつける。
fluff.ko: 피붙이와 선조가 맡긴 책임을 엄중하게 인식하는 헤른킨은 단 한 발의 탄약도 낭비하지 않겠다는 굳은 결의를 가지고 사격에 임한다.
fluff.zh: 远行者们十分清楚氏族与先祖所交付给他们的重担，因此他们会刻苦磨练自身的射击技巧，确保每一发子弹都不会被浪费。

target.en: That <k>PIONEERS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>パイオニア</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged PIONEERS unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete Pionier-Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termine un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad PIONEROS amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité de Pionniers amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità di Pionieri non ingaggiata amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるパイオニア・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 개척자 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，在一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方先锋单位 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Pioneers operate in great peril behind hostile lines so often that it becomes second nature to respond with alacrity and cunning to the slightest scraps of intelligence on enemy movements.
fluff.de: Pioniere operieren so häufig in großer Gefahr weit hinter den feindlichen Linien, dass es ihnen ein Leichtes geworden ist, schnell und listig auf die kleinsten Bruchstücke von Informationen über Feindbewegungen zu reagieren.
fluff.es: Los Pioneros operan con gran peligro tras las líneas hostiles con tanta frecuencia que se vuelve instintivo responder con presteza y astucia al más mínimo indicio de movimiento enemigo.
fluff.fr: Les pionniers opèrent si souvent en danger derrière les lignes hostiles que réagir à la moindre indication sur les manœuvres ennemies est pour eux une seconde nature.
fluff.it: I Pionieri operano talmente spesso in situazioni pericolose dietro le linee nemiche che istintivamente reagiscono con celerità e astuzia non appena ricevono informazioni sui movimenti avversari.
fluff.ja: 敵戦線の背後で危険な任務に従事することを常とするパイオニアは、敵の動きに関する断片的情報にも、迅速かつ巧妙に反応する術を身につけている。
fluff.ko: 극히 위험한 적 전선 뒤에서 활동하는 것은 개척자에게 일상이나 다름없다. 때문에 이들은 적의 움직임에 대한 손톱만한 첩보라도 확보하면 마치 본능처럼 기민하고 교묘하게 움직인다.
fluff.zh: 先锋队时常在敌阵之后展开危险的行动，因此在得知任何关于敌军动向的情报时便会几乎直觉性的做出反应。

target.en: One friendly <k>Hernkyn</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方<k>ヘルンキン</k>・ユニット1個。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. Friendly Leagues of Votann units’ attacks that target that enemy unit have [Ignores Cover].
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Attacken befreundeter Konglomerate-der-Votann-Einheiten gegen jene feindliche Einheit haben [Deckung ignorieren].
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible para tu unidad y a 12" o menos de ella. Los ataques a distancia de las unidades Ligas de los Votann amigas que tomen como blanco esa unidad enemiga tienen [Ignora cobertura].
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. Les attaques des unités des Ligues de Votann amies qui ciblent l’unité ennemie choisie ont [Ignore le Couvert].
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Gli attacchi delle unità delle Leghe dei Votann amiche che hanno come bersaglio quell’unità nemica hanno [Ignora la Copertura].
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。味方リーグ・オヴ・ヴォータン・ユニットの攻撃が、その敵ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した場合、その攻撃は［遮蔽無効］を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 시야에 들어오며 12" 내에 있는 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 아군 보탄 연맹 유닛의 공격에 [엄폐 무시]를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于该己方单位 12" 内且对其可见的敌方单位。己方沃坦联盟单位对那个敌方单位进行的远程攻击拥有[无视掩体]。

fluff.en: Casting a jaundiced eye over the so-called fortifications of their foes, the Hernkyn quickly identify weak spots in the enemy defences and spread the word to their comrades.
fluff.de: Mit einem herablassenden Blick auf die sogenannten Befestigungen ihrer Feinde identifizieren die Hernkyn schnell die Schwachstellen und geben die Informationen an ihre Kameraden weiter.
fluff.es: Con cierto desprecio hacia las fortificaciones enemigas, los Hernkyn identifican rápidamente los puntos débiles en las defensas enemigas y pasan la información a sus camaradas.
fluff.fr: D'un regard cynique sur les soi-disant fortifications de leurs ennemis, les Hernkogs identifient les points faibles des défenses adverses et font passer le mot à leurs camarades.
fluff.it: Rivolgendo lo sguardo impietoso verso le cosiddette fortificazioni dei nemici, i Confratelli di Caccia ne identificano immediatamente i punti deboli e li comunicano ai compagni.
fluff.ja: 敵が“要塞”と呼ぶその代物を冷ややかな視線で眺めつつ、ヘルンキンは防御網の脆弱箇所を迅速に特定し、即座に同胞へ共有する。
fluff.ko: 적이 ‘요새’라고 부르는 것을 코웃음치며 확인한 헤른킨은 방어 태세에서 재빨리 약점을 식별한 다음 동지들에게 정보를 전달한다.
fluff.zh: 在刻薄地审视敌人所谓的防御后，远行者们能够快速识别出其中的弱点并将它们告诉友军。

target.en: That <k>Einhyr Hearthguard</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アインヒル・ハースガード</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Einhyr Hearthguard unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Einhyr-Flammenwächter-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Guardamoradas Einhyr amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Âtregardes Einhyrs amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Guardie del Focolare Einhyr amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方アインヒル・ハースガード・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 에인히르 하스가드 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方断角炉卫单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s ranged attacks have:
  • +1 S.
  • If you spend 1 YP, [Sustained Hits 1].
effect.de:
Die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben:
  • +1 S.
  • Wenn du 1 RP ausgibst, [Trefferhagel 1].
effect.es:
Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen:
  • +1 a F.
  • Si gastas 1 PB, [Golpes sostenidos 1].
effect.fr:
Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont :
  • +1 en F.
  • Si vous dépensez 1 PdR, elles ont [Touches Soutenues 1].
effect.it:
Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno:
  • +1 Fo.
  • Se spendi 1 PP, [Scarica di Colpi 1].
effect.ja:
そのユニットの射撃攻撃は以下を持つ：
  • 【攻】に+1の修正を受ける。
  • 自軍が1YPを使用した場合、［連続命中1］。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 위력 +1
  • 1YP 소모 시 [연타 1]
effect.zh:
该己方单位的远程攻击拥有：
  • S 属性 +1。
  • 如果您花费了 1 点 YP，那么攻击还拥有 [连击 1] 技能。

fluff.en: As though they unleash the raging flames of their kindred’s hearth upon the enemy, the Einhyr all but drown their enemies in fire.
fluff.de: Ganz als würden sie die tosende Flamme ihrer Sippe gegen den Feind entfesseln, überschütten die Einhyr ihre Widersacher geradezu mit Feuer.
fluff.es: Como si desataran las furiosas llamas del hogar de su raza sobre el enemigo, los Einhyr ahogan a sus enemigos en fuego.
fluff.fr: Alors qu’ils déchaînent le feu rageur du foyer de leur cognation, les Einhyrs noient littéralement l’ennemi dans les flammes.
fluff.it: Gli Einhyr seppelliscono i nemici fra le fiamme, come a rovesciare loro addosso il fuoco feroce del focolare famigliare.
fluff.ja: 無慈悲なるアインヒルは、あたかも閥族の炉床で燃え盛る焔のごとき砲火の奔流に敵を沈める。
fluff.ko: 피붙이의 하스가 품은 맹렬한 불길을 끼얹듯, 에인히르는 적을 압도적 화력 속에 익사시킨다.
fluff.zh: 如同炉火的烈焰被释放，断角战士们将敌人淹没在火力之下。

target.en: That <k>Einhyr Hearthguard</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アインヒル・ハースガード</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Einhyr Hearthguard unit with Deep Strike is selected to make an ingress move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine Einhyr-Flammenwächter-Einheit mit Schocktruppen gewählt wird, eine Einsatzbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, siempre que una unidad Guardamoradas Einhyr amiga con Despliegue rápido se elige para hacer un movimiento de inserción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité d’Âtregardes Einhyrs amie avec Frappe en Profondeur est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Guardie del Focolare Einhyr amica con Attacco in Profondità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方の縦深攻撃を持つアインヒル・ハースガード・ユニットが突入移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 심층 타격을 보유한 아군 에인히르 하스가드 유닛이 진입 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个拥有深入打击的己方断角炉卫单位被选中进行一次入场移动时。

effect.en:
• Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
  • Your unit is not eligible to declare a charge until the end of the turn.
effect.de:
• Deine Einheit kann horizontal weiter als 6" von allen feindlichen Einheiten entfernt auf dem Schlachtfeld aufgestellt werden, selbst in der Aufstellungszone deines Gegners.
  • Deine Einheit kommt bis zum Ende des Zugs nicht infrage, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es:
• Tu unidad se puede desplegar en cualquier punto del campo de batalla a más de 6" en horizontal de toda unidad enemiga, incluso en la zona de despliegue del oponente.
  • Tu unidad no es apta para declarar cargas hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr:
• Votre unité peut être placée n’importe où sur le champ de bataille à plus de 6" à l’horizontale des unités ennemies, et même dans la zone de déploiement adverse.
  • Jusqu’à la fin du tour, votre unité n’est pas éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it:
• La tua unità può essere schierata ovunque sul campo, a più di 6" in orizzontale da tutte le unità nemiche, anche se si trova nella zona di dispiegamento dell’avversario.
  • La tua unità non è idonea a dichiarare una carica fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja:
• その自軍ユニットは、あらゆる敵ユニットから水平方向に6mvより遠く離れている場所であれば、敵軍側初期配置ゾーンを含めて、戦場の地点に配置可能。
  • そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言できない。
effect.ko:
• 이 유닛은 적 유닛으로부터 수평으로 6" 넘게 떨어지는 한, 상대의 배치 구역을 포함해 전장 어디든 놓을 수 있습니다. .
  • 이 유닛은 턴이 종료될 때까지 돌격 선언이 불가능합니다.
effect.zh:
• 您的单位可以被部署在战场上位于所有敌方单位水平 6" 外的任意位置，这也包括对手部署区内的位置。
  • 直到回合结束前，您的单位不能宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: Built to a superior standard using secrets imparted by the Votann, the teleporters employed by this Hearthband can stabilise rematerialisation fields remarkably close to the foe.
fluff.de: Die Teleporter dieses Flammenverbandes sind auf unerreichtem Standard konstruiert, wobei Geheimnisse aus dem Wissensschatz der Votann zum Einsatz kamen. Sie können Rematerialisierungsfelder bemerkenswert nah am Feind stabilisieren.
fluff.es: Estos teletransportadores, fabricados a un nivel superior utilizando secretos impartidos por los Votann, pueden estabilizar los campos de rematerialización muy cerca del enemigo.
fluff.fr: Construits avec une qualité supérieure grâce aux secrets des Votann, les téléporteurs employés par cette Âtrebande peuvent stabiliser les champs de rematérialisation remarquablement près de l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Prodotti secondo parametri di qualità superiore tramite segreti trasmessi dai Votann, i teletrasporti usati da questa Banda del Focolare possono stabilizzare i campi di rimaterializzazione anche nelle vicinanze del nemico.
fluff.ja: ヴォータンから伝授された秘密のテクノロジーを使って作られた、この部隊の有する優れた転移装置（ルビ、転移装置：テレポーター）は、敵の間近まで迫った位置に安定した実体化フィールドを発生させることができる。
fluff.ko: 이 하스단이 사용하는 텔레포터는 보탄이 나눠준 비밀 덕분에 뛰어난 성능을 자랑하며, 적과 매우 가까운 위치에서 재물질화장을 안정화할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 这个传送装置使用沃坦所透露的秘密学识制造而成，拥有卓越的品质，能够让炉心战队在非常接近敌人的位置物质化。

target.en: That <k>Einhyr Hearthguard</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アインヒル・ハースガード</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Einhyr Hearthguard</k> unit.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Einhyr-Flammenwächter</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Guardamoradas Einhyr</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité d’<k>Âtregardes Einhyrs</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità di <k>Guardie del Focolare Einhyr</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>アインヒル・ハースガード</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>에인히르 하스가드</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中或在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位对一个己方<k>断角炉卫</k>单位进行攻击时。

effect.en: Your unit has 4+ InSv.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは【特防】4+を持つ。

fluff.en: These micro shield generators, worked into warrior jewellery or armour crests, trigger on command to provide short‑lived boosted protection.
fluff.de: Diese Mikroschildgeneratoren, die in Juwelen oder Panzerungszinnen verbaut sind, werden auf Befehl ausgelöst, um kurzzeitig den Schutz zu erhöhen.
fluff.es: Estos microgeneradores de escudo, integrados en joyas o crestas blindadas, se activan para dar una protección mayor durante unos momentos.
fluff.fr: Ces microgénérateurs de bouclier, intégrés à quelque parure ou cimier, se déclenchent sur commande pour fournir un bref surcroît de protection.
fluff.it: Questi microgeneratori di scudo, installati nei gioielli o nelle creste, si azionano a comando per aumentare brevemente la protezione delle corazze.
fluff.ja: 戦士の宝玉や装甲の紋章に組み込まれたこの小型シールド発生装置“不壊なる結び”（ルビ、不壊なる結び：ブレックノット）は、コマンドに応じて作動し、短時間だが防御力を飛躍的に高めることができる。
fluff.ko: 전사의 보석 장식이나 갑주의 볏머리에 삽입되는 이 초소형 장치를 발동하면 일시적으로 보호막이 생성된다.
fluff.zh: 这些微型护盾生成器被镶入了战士穿戴的饰品或者护甲纹章之中，在被激活之后，它们能够提供短暂的额外保护。

target.en: Up to two friendly <k>Sagitaur</k> units.
target.it: Fino a due unità di <k>Sagitaur</k> amiche.
target.ja: 最大2個までの味方<k>サジタウル</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 最多两个己方<k>人马座战车</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit. Your units’ ranged attacks that target that enemy unit can:
  • Re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
  • Re-roll wound rolls of 1.
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit. Für die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen jene Einheit können:
  • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga. Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco esa unidad pueden:
  • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
  • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie. Les attaques de tir de vos unités qui ciblent l’unité ennemie choisie peuvent :
  • Relancer les jets de touche de 1.
  • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica. Gli attacchi da tiro delle tue unità che hanno come bersaglio quell’unità possono:
  • Ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
  • Ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
effect.ja:
敵ユニットを1個選択する。その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は、選択した敵ユニットを攻撃対象にしている場合、以下が可能になる：
  • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールする。
  • ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールする。
effect.ko:
적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛을 대상으로 한 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 1인 명중 굴림 재굴림
  • 값이 1인 타격 굴림 재굴림
effect.zh:
选择一个敌方单位。您的单位对那个敌方单位进行的远程攻击可以：
  • 重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
  • 重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: With their quarry caught outflanked and in the open, the Sagitaurs’ gunners coordinate fire to pick them apart with swift efficiency.
fluff.de: Wenn ihre Beute umzingelt und ins Offene getrieben ist, koordinieren die Schützen der Sagitauren ihr Feuer, um sie mit effizienter Schnelligkeit auszuschalten.
fluff.es: Con su presa flanqueada y en campo abierto, los artilleros de los Sagitauros coordinan el fuego para aniquilarla con rápida eficiencia.
fluff.fr: Leur cible prise de flanc et à découvert, les artilleurs des Sagitaur coordonnent leurs tirs pour l’éliminer vite et bien.
fluff.it: Una volta circondato e sorpreso il nemico, gli artiglieri dei Sagitaur coordinano il tiro per eliminarlo sistematicamente.
fluff.ja: 獲物の側背を突き、遮蔽物を無用の長物にしたことで、サジタウルの砲手たちは連携して射撃を集中させ、効率的で速やかに敵を引き裂いていく。
fluff.ko: 개활지에서 측면이 노출된 사냥감을 상대로, 사지타우르 사수들은 사격을 긴밀히 조율하여 극히 효율적인 공격을 퍼붓는다.
fluff.zh: 在包抄了敌人并让他们无处可藏后，人马座战车的炮手们能够展开协调攻击，以极高的效率歼灭敌人。

name.fr: Débordement de Blindés par le Flanc

target.en: Up to two friendly Sagitaur units in strategic reserves.
target.de: Bis zu zwei befreundete Sagitauros-Einheiten in strategischer Reserve
target.es: Hasta 2 unidades Sagitauro amigas que estén en la reserva estratégica.
target.fr: Deux unités de Sagitaur amies en réserve stratégique maximum.
target.it: Fino a due unità Sagitaur amiche nelle riserve strategiche.
target.ja: 戦略的予備戦力に配置されている味方サジタウル・ユニットを最大2個。
target.zh: 最多两个位于战略预备队中的己方人马座战车单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
when.de: Ende der Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, ab der zweiten Schlachtrunde
when.es: Al final de la fase de movimiento del oponente, desde la 2.ª ronda de batalla en adelante.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Mouvement adverse, à partir du deuxième round de bataille.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Movimento dell’avversario, dal secondo round di battaglia in poi.
when.ja: 第2バトルラウンドから、敵軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.ko: 두 번째 전투 라운드부터, 상대의 이동 페이즈 종료 시.
when.zh: 从第二个战斗轮次开始，在您对手的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Your units each make an ingress move.
effect.de: Deine Einheiten führen jeweils eine Einsatzbewegung aus.
effect.es: Cada una de tus unidades hace un movimiento de inserción.
effect.fr: Vos unités font un mouvement d’arrivée chacune.
effect.it: Le tue unità effettuano ciascuna un movimento di inserzione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは突入移動を行う。
effect.zh: 您的单位各进行一次入场移动。

fluff.en: With the foes’ weaknesses identified, outflanking Sagitaurs streak in to exploit the gaps and punch deep into their lines.
fluff.de: Nun, da die Schwäche des Feindes offengelegt wurde, donnern Sagitauren über die Flanken heran, um die Breschen auszunutzen und tief in die gegnerischen Linien vorzudringen.
fluff.es: Una vez identificadas las debilidades enemigas, los Sagitauros que flanquean la zona se lanzan a la carrera para explotar las brechas y penetrar profundamente en sus líneas.
fluff.fr: Les faiblesses ennemies identifiées, des Sagitaur prennent l’adversaire de flanc pour exploiter les failles et plonger dans ses lignes.
fluff.it: Una volta identificati i punti deboli del nemico, i Sagitaur attaccano sfruttando le aperture e sfondando le linee avversarie.
fluff.ja: 敵の弱点が特定されると、間隙を突いてサジタウルが側背攻撃を行い、敵戦線の奥深くまで切り込んでいく。
fluff.ko: 적의 약점을 식별한 사지타우르 부대는 틈새를 이용해 적 전선 깊이 침투하기 위해 신속한 우회 기동을 수행한다.
fluff.zh: 在识别了敌人的弱点后，在侧翼行动的人马座战车立即驶入敌阵的漏洞并展开突袭。

target.en: That <k>Sagitaur</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>サジタウル</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Sagitaur</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Sagitauros</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Sagitauro</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Sagitaur</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità <k>Sagitaur</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>サジタウル</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>사지타우르</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>人马座战车</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité et dont la F est supérieur à son E ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした射撃攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 한 원거리 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对您的单位进行的远程攻击的 S 属性大于该单位的 T 属性时，攻击的致伤掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: Intended to shrug off the worst punishment by hostile alien environments, not to mention the hostile aliens themselves, Sagitaurs can withstand remarkable quantities of enemy fire.
fluff.de: Sagitauren wurden mit der Absicht konstruiert, den feindseligsten Umgebungen fremder Planeten zu widerstehen, sodass sie auch bemerkenswert viel Feindfeuer einstecken können.
fluff.es: Diseñados para eludir el peor castigo de entornos alienígenas hostiles, por no hablar de los propios seres alienígenas, los Sagitauros pueden resistir cantidades notables de fuego enemigo.
fluff.fr: Conçus pour résister aux environnements étrangers les plus hostiles, sans parlers des espèces étrangères elles-mêmes, les Sagitaur peuvent encaisser une quantité remarquable de tirs ennemis.
fluff.it: Progettati per sopravvivere agli ambienti alieni più ostili, nonché alle attenzioni dei nemici, i Sagitaur riescono a sopportare volumi di fuoco estremi.
fluff.ja: 過酷な異星環境からの甚大な被害のみならず、敵対的な異星人そのものからの攻撃を物ともしないように作られたサジタウルは、敵からの膨大な射撃にも耐えることができる。
fluff.ko: 거친 외계 환경뿐 아니라 적대적 외계종의 공격도 견딜 수 있도록 설계된 사지타우르는 엄청난 양의 적 사격도 견뎌낼 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 人马座战车被设计能够抵御最为恶劣的外星环境，这也包括恶劣的异形生物本身，因此拥有出色的防御能力。

name.ja: 全周波ロックオン（アップグレード）

description.en:
PIONEERS unit only. In your Shooting phase, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit. That enemy unit is spotted:
  • While a unit is spotted, that unit has +3" detection range.
description.de:
Nur für eine Pionier-Einheit. In deiner Fernkampfphase kannst du eine für dies Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene Einheit ist gesichtet:
  • Solange eine Einheit gesichtet ist, hat sie +3" Entdeckungs­reichweite.
description.es:
Solo unidad PIONEROS. En tu fase de disparo, puedes elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de esta unidad. Esa unidad enemiga está avistada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté avistada, tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
description.fr:
Unité de Pionniers seulement. À votre phase de Tir, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie visible à 12" ou moins de cette unité. L’unité ennemie choisie est pointée:
  • Tant qu’une unité est pointée, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
description.it:
Solo unità di Pionieri. Nella tua fase di Tiro puoi scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" da questa unità. Quell’unità nemica è avvistata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è avvistata, quell’unità ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja:
パイオニア・ユニットのみ。自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択してもよい。選択された敵ユニットは捕捉状態となる。
  • ユニットが 捕捉状態である間、そのユニットは発見範囲に+3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko:
개척자 유닛 전용. 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 시야에 들어오며 12" 내에 있는 적 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 유닛은 감적됩니다.
  • 유닛이 감적된 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh:
仅限先锋单位。在己方射击阶段中，您可以选择一个位于该单位 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被发现：
  • 当一个单位被发现，那个单位拥有 +3" 侦测范围。

description.en: Kâhl model only. This model has +2 W.
description.de: Nur für ein Kâhl-Modell. Dieses Modell hat +2 LP.
description.es: Solo miniatura Kâhl. Esta miniatura tiene +2 a H.
description.fr: Figurine de Kâhl seulement. Cette figurine a +2 en PV.
description.it: Solo modelli di Kâhl. Questo modello ha +2 Fe.
description.ja: カール・兵のみ。この兵の【傷】は+2の修正を受ける。
description.zh: 仅限战群统领模型。该模型的 W 属性 +2。

name.ja: 飽和侵食弾（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Sagitaur</k> unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Sagitauros</k>-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben <k>[Deckung ignorieren]</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Sagitauro</k>. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
description.fr: Unité de <k>Sagitaur</k> seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Sagitaur</k>. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
description.ja: <k>サジタウル</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
description.ko:
<k>사지타우르</k> 유닛 전용.
이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>人马座战车</k>单位。该单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>技能。

name.ja: ウィーヴウェルケの護り（アップグレード）

description.en: Yaegirs unit only. This unit has ‑3" detection range.
description.de: Nur für eine Yaeger-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat -3" Entdeckungs­reichweite.
description.es: Solo unidad Yaegirs. Esta unidad tiene -3" al alcance de detección.
description.fr: Unité de Yaegirs seulement. Cette unité a ‑3" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo unità di Yaegir. Questa unità ha -3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja: イェーギル・ユニットのみ。このユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 예이기르 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限猎手单位。该单位的侦测范围 -3"。

name.ja: 最適化攻撃ライン（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Sagitaur</k> unit only. This unit has <k>Mobile</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Sagitauros</k>-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat <k>Mobil</k>.
description.fr: Unité de <k>Sagitaur</k> seulement. Cette unité a le mot-clé <k>Mobile</k>.
description.it: Solo modelli di <k>Sagitaur</k>. Questa unità ha <k>Agile</k>.
description.ja: <k>サジタウル</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。
description.zh: 仅限<k>人马座战车</k>单位。该单位拥有<k>机动</k>关键词。

description.en: Kâhl model only. In the Fight phase, when a model in this unit is destroyed, if this unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove that model from the battlefield; after this unit has fought, or at the end of the phase (whichever comes first), that model is removed from the battlefield.
description.de: Nur für ein Kâhl-Modell. Wenn in der Nahkampfphase ein Modell dieser Einheit zerstört wird und diese Einheit in dieser Phase noch nicht zum Kämpfen gewählt wurde, wirf einen W6: Bei 4+ entferne jenes Modell nicht vom Schlachtfeld; nachdem diese Einheit gekämpft hat oder am Ende der Phase (was immer zuerst eintritt) wird jenes Modell vom Schlachtfeld entfernt.
description.es: Solo miniatura Kâhl. En la fase de combate, cuando una miniatura de esta unidad es eliminada, si esta unidad no se ha elegido para combatir en esta fase, tira 1D6: con 4+, no retires esa miniatura del campo de batalla, retírala después de que haya combatido o al final de la fase (lo que ocurra antes).
description.fr: Figurine de Kâhl seulement. À la phase de Combat, quand une figurine de cette unité est détruite, si cette unité n’a pas été choisie pour combattre à cette phase, jetez un D6 : sur 4+, ne retirez pas la figurine du champ de bataille ; une fois que cette unité a combattu, ou à la fin de la phase (selon ce qui advient en premier), la figurine est retirée du champ de bataille.
description.it: Solo modelli di Kâhl. Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un modello di questa unità viene distrutto, se questa unità non è stata scelta per combattere in questa fase, tira un D6: con 4+ non rimuovere quel modello dal campo; dopo che questa unità ha combattuto, o alla fine della fase (ciò che avviene prima), quel modello viene rimosso dal campo.
description.ja: カール・兵のみ。白兵フェイズ中、このユニット内の兵が撃破された時、このユニットがこのフェイズ中に白兵を宣言していなかった場合、D6を1個ロールする。ロール結果が4+の場合、その兵を戦場から取り除かない。その自軍ユニットが白兵を行うか、そのフェイズ終了時のいずれかの条件が満たされた時点で、その兵を戦場から取り除く。
description.ko: 카알 모델 전용. 백병전 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 모델이 파괴될 때, 이 유닛이 이번 페이즈에 백병전 수행을 위해 지정되지 않았었다면, D6를 하나 굴립니다. 값이 4+이면 그 모델은 전장에서 바로 제거되지 않습니다. 이 유닛이 백병전 수행을 종료한 다음, 또는 그 페이즈 종료 시(이 중 어느 하나라도 충족 시), 그 모델을 전장에서 제거합니다.
description.zh: 仅限战群统领模型。在近战阶段中，当该单位中的一个模型被摧毁时，如果该单位在本阶段中没有被选择进行近战，那么掷一枚 D6：若结果为 4+，那么不要将那个模型移出战场；在该单位完成近战后，或者在阶段结束时（以先发生者为准），将那个模型移出战场。

description.en: **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. At the end of the turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you spent no YP in that turn, you can gain 1YP.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model equipped with an Autoch‑pattern combi‑bolter only. Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 3YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Once per turn, when you target the bearer’s unit with the Command Re‑roll Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend 1YP and reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the attacking model is within 12" of the bearer’s unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, if the attacking model is within 18" of the bearer’s unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 instead.

**KÂHL** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **TITANIC** units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

**KÂHL** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an assailed unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.
**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, you gain 1YP for each assailed enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (to a maximum of 3YP).

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, select one **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is pinned.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend up to 4YP. Select one **HERNKYN** unit from your army, and, for every 2YP you just spent, select up to one additional **HERNKYN** unit from your army. You can remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units (excluding assailed units).

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **CTHONIAN BESERKS** unit visible to the bearer and then spend any number of YP. Return one destroyed model to that unit and then, for every 2YP you just spent, return up to one additional destroyed model to that unit.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Once per battle, in your Movement phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **CTHONIAN** unit that is in Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN ARTILLERY** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those **ARTILLERY** units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, add 1 to the Hit roll.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to fight, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 2YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

**KÂHL** model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control that are not within your deployment zone, you can spend 1YP. If you do, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn, or if you spend 2YP, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability.

**KÂHL** model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT** units, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP and hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.
**IRON‑MASTER** model only. Each time a friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model is repaired using the bearer’s Forgewrought Expertise ability, that model regains 1 additional lost wound.
**IRON‑MASTER** or **MEMNYR STRATEGIST** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.
**IRON‑MASTER** or **MEMNYR STRATEGIST** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

**MEMNYR STRATEGIST** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if you spend YP using the Optimal Application Detachment rule when doing so, you can roll one D6: on a 2+, you gain 1YP.

**IRON‑MASTER** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, and in the Fight phase, after the bearer has fought, select one enemy **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
**KÂHL** model only. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by the bearer’s unit, gain 2YP.
**MEMNYR STRATEGIST** model only. At the end of your turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you gained fewer than 3YP this turn, you gain an amount of YP equal to the difference.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

**LEAGUES OF VOTANN** model only. At the start of the Command phase, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the turn, while an enemy unit is within 3" of the bearer, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.
Each time the bearer takes a Hazardous test for this weapon profile, subtract 2 from the result.
While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** units (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability), this model has the Lone Operative ability.

Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, one model with this ability can use it when it is selected to shoot. If it does, you must spend 1YP and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that model have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability and, after that model has shot this phase, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, you can gain up to 2YP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** transmatter inverter; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Clad in heavy‑duty hauberks to shield them from the worst of their weapons’ emissions, Arkanyst Evaluators unleash deadly experimental energies into the foe. Their transmatter inverters painfully rupture cellular tissue or trigger lethal atomic transformations, all to provide the Evaluator with the field data needed to hone their weapon further.

description.en: Melee weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability

You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:

▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Kromlôk’s Revenge; Warforge Gauntlets.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Wielding the mighty pick-hammer Kromlôk’s Revenge, Berehk Stornbröw leads his hand-chosen Cthonian Beserks – known as Berehk’s Breakers – into the heart of battle. Able to shrug off almost any punishment his enemies level against him and keep on fighting, Berehk is an unstoppable force of destruction who specialises in laying low the enemy’s champions

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CTHONIAN BESERKS**

description.en: While this unit is within 3" of one or more friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE** or **IRONKIN STEELJACKS** units, if this unit is not an Attached unit, it has the Lone Operative ability.
Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

At the end of your Movement phase, this unit can repair one friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE**, **EXOFRAME** or **IRONKIN STEELJACKS** unit within 3" of it. One model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds instead if this unit contains an Ironkin Assistant model. Each unit can only be repaired once per turn.

composition.en: * *If this unit’s Brôkhyr Iron‐master model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining E‐COG models are also destroyed. While embarking within a* **TRANSPORT** *and while embarked within a* **TRANSPORT**, *each E‐COG model takes up the space of 0 models.*

loadout.en:
**The Iron-master is equipped with:** graviton rifle; graviton hammer.
**The Ironkin Assistant is equipped with:** las-beam cutter; close combat weapon.
**One E-COG is equipped with:** Autoch-pattern bolt pistol; close combat weapon.
**One other E-COG is equipped with:** plasma torch.
**One other E-COG is equipped with:** manipulator arms.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Iron‑masters are amongst the most accomplished Brôkhyr of their guild. In battle, they maintain damaged war engines and mechanised soldiery, often aided by Ironkin and COG repair crews. These veteran Brôkhyr also bring their most powerful personal creations to war, taking satisfaction in unleashing them upon the foe.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN** ■ **HEARTHKYN WARRIORS**

description.en: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt cannon; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: All models in this unit can each have their bolt cannon replaced with 1 SP conversion beamer.
All models in this unit can each have their bolt cannon replaced with 1 graviton blast cannon.

fluff.en: When a Brôkhyr hooks into a powerful exoframe, they become Thunderkyn. Adapted from rigs used to maintain Kin spacecraft, these armoured exoskeletons exchange repair tools for massive heavy weapons, which the Brôkhyr use to lay down withering covering fire for the oathbands and to pick off enemy armour.

description.en: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.
In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6+2".

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolt pistol; Bane.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Buri Aegnirssen surges into the foe with the ferocious abandon of one with nothing left to lose. With sweeps of his adaptable darkstar glaive, Bane, this inveterate survivor carves a bloody path through the enemy. Not even the most monstrous prey can evade the colossal reach of the Thrice‑devoured’s vengeance.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if units from your army have Fortify Takeover: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks made with a mole grenade launcher. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem.

**Designer’s Note:** *We recommend placing a Mole Grenade token next to that enemy unit as a reminder.*

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** heavy plasma axe.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 model that is not equipped with a twin concussion gauntlet or a mole grenade launcher can be equipped with 1 mole grenade launcher. *  * **Designer’s Note:** *If a Cthonian Beserk is equipped with a mole grenade launcher, it will be accompanied by an L‑COG unit: both models should be placed on the same base and together they act as a single model for all rules purposes.*
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 model that is not equipped with a mole grenade launcher can have its heavy plasma axe or concussion maul replaced with 1 twin concussion gauntlet.
All models in this unit can each have their heavy plasma axe replaced with 1 concussion maul.

fluff.en: Cthonian Beserks are amongst the most heavily augmented and courageous Kin. Brandishing mining tools that double as weapons of war and unleashing explosives that tunnel through solid rock, the Beserks storm the enemy’s strong points and rupture them as if they were asteroids filled with seams of precious ore.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its tremor shells. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Up to twice per battle, in your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack with its breacher ordnance, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place two breacher ordnance tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this unit uses this ability.*

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** 2 Autoch‑pattern bolt pistols, breacher ordnance; plasma picks.

wargear.en: All models in this unit can each have their breacher ordnance replaced with 1 tremor shells.

fluff.en: Earthshakers undermine enemy positions with subterranean artillery fire. Some batteries use tremor shells to destabilise strongpoints with deadly quakes. Breacher ordnance, meanwhile, drills to the surface before detonating in a storm of shrapnel, whilst those payloads which initially fail to lock onto their targets hunt them down using geomantic echolocation.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

Each time this model ends a Charge move, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.
While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.
The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Autoch-pattern combi-bolter; mass hammer; weavefield crest.

wargear.en: This model’s weavefield crest can be replaced with 1 teleport crest.
This model’s mass hammer can be replaced with 1 darkstar axe.

fluff.en: Einhyr Champions wear modified exoarmour fitted with mass drivers. Combined with their formidable close‑quarters weaponry and bulky RAM shields, this wargear transforms them into living battering rams whose accelerated charge hits hard enough to smash clean through armoured fortress gates.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **EINHYR HEARTHGUARD**

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.
Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

loadout.en:
**Every model is equipped with:** EtaCarn plasma gun; exoarmour grenade launcher; concussion gauntlet.
**The Hesyr is additionally equipped with:** weavefield crest.

wargear.en: The Hesyr’s weavefield crest can be replaced with 1 teleport crest.
The Hesyr’s concussion gauntlet or plasma blade gauntlet can be replaced with 1 graviton hammer.
All models in this unit can each have their concussion gauntlet replaced with 1 plasma blade gauntlet.
All models in this unit can each have their EtaCarn plasma gun replaced with 1 volkanite disintegrator.

fluff.en: Clad in formidable exoarmour and equipped with a fearsome array of weaponry, Einhyr Hearthguard are a force to be reckoned with. Whether forming bodyguards around their oathband’s heroes or striking deep into the heart of enemy territory, they are unstoppable on the attack and immovable in defence.

description.en: While this unit is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of this unit’s **GRIMNYR** model. That unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

composition.en: * *If this unit’s Grimnyr model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining CORV models are also destroyed. While embarking within a* **TRANSPORT** *and while embarked within a* **TRANSPORT**, *each CORV model takes up the space of 0 models.*

loadout.en:
**The Grimnyr is equipped with:** Ancestral Wrath; ancestral ward stave.
**Every CORV is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolter; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Grimnyr – or Living Ancestors – are privy to the wisdom of the Votann and as close to priests as the secular Kin get. Equipped with barrier tech such as ward staves and energy‑focusing CORVs, they can rouse the fury of the Immaterium against their foes.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **HEARTHKYN WARRIORS**

name.en: Luck Has. Need Keeps. Toil Earns.

description.en: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

loadout.en:
**The Theyn is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolt pistol; Autoch‑pattern bolter; close combat weapon; weavefield crest.
**Every Hearthkyn Warrior is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolt pistol; Autoch‑pattern bolter; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: The Theyn can be equipped with 1 Theyn’s melee weapon.
The Theyn’s Autoch-pattern bolter can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 ion blaster ◦ 1 Theyn’s pistol
Up to 2 Hearthkyn Warriors can each have their Autoch‑pattern bolter or ion blaster replaced with 1 plasma knife.

Up to 2 Hearthkyn Warriors can each have their Autoch‑pattern bolter or ion blaster replaced with one of the following (duplicates are not allowed): ◦ 1 HYLas auto rifle ◦ 1 HYLas rotary cannon ◦ 1 L7 missile launcher ◦ 1 EtaCarn plasma beamer ◦ 1 magna‑rail rifle
Any number of Hearthkyn Warriors can each have their Autoch‑pattern bolter replaced with 1 ion blaster.

fluff.en: Well‑armoured, well‑trained and equipped with powerful weaponry, Hearthkyn Warriors form the backbone of most oathbands. Led by their Theyns, they lay down hails of firepower, shrugging off the enemy’s return volleys before storming in to shatter their wavering foes for good.

description.en: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.
Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll.
Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** cyclic ion cannon; MATR autocannon; 2 twin bolt cannons; armoured wheels; pan spectral scanner.

wargear.en: This model’s panspectral scanner can be replaced with 1 Hekaton warhead.
This model’s cyclic ion cannon can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 SP heavy conversion beamer ◦ 1 heavy magna-rail cannon
This model’s 2 twin bolt cannons can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 twin bolt cannon and 1 twin ion beamer ◦ 2 twin ion beamers

fluff.en: The iconic battle tank and armoured transport of the Leagues of Votann, the Hekaton Land Fortress is as venerable and well‑respected as it is powerful. With a fearsome arsenal of heavy weaponry, tremendously resilient armour, and the ability to bear bands of Kin soldiery into battle, it is a versatile military asset.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** models. Each **EXOARMOUR**, **EXOFRAME** or **IRONKIN STEELJACKS** model takes up the space of 2 models. It cannot transport **ARTILLERY** models.

description.en: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt revolver; bolt shotgun; magna-coil autocannon; plasma knife.

wargear.en: 1 model that is not equipped with either a HYLas rotary cannon or an ion beamer can be equipped with 1 rollbar searchlight. *  * A model can only take one of these options, and cannot be equipped with a HYLas rotary cannon or an ion beamer.
1 model that is not equipped with either a HYLas rotary cannon or an ion beamer can be equipped with 1 panspectral scanner. *
1 model that is not equipped with either a HYLas rotary cannon or an ion beamer can be equipped with 1 multiwave comms array. *
For every 3 models in this unit, 1 model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 HYLas rotary cannon ◦ 1 ion beamer

fluff.en: Hernkyn Pioneers skim across alien worlds and scout enemy positions, riding on their magna‑coil bikes. Fast, resilient, and possessed of formidable firepower, these far‑ranging bands of warriors often strike at the foe from unexpected quarters or send back intelligence on enemy movements to their oathband’s commanders.

description.en: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6”.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt shotgun; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: 1 Hernkyn Yaegir can have its bolt revolver and plasma knife or its bolt shotgun replaced with 1 APM launcher.
1 Hernkyn Yaegir can have its bolt revolver and plasma knife or its bolt shotgun replaced with 1 magna-coil rifle.
All models in this unit can each have their bolt shotgun replaced with 1 bolt revolver and 1 plasma knife.

fluff.en: Merciless forward operatives charged with denying crucial assets to the foe, Yaegirs use every weapon and tactic at their disposal to make the ancestors proud. They typically deploy ahead of their prospect or oathband, with assassination and sabotage amongst their unscrupulous strategies, to bleed the strength from their kindred’s foes.

name.en: Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators

keywords.en: Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators

description.en: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem. If units from your army have Fortify Takeover, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ while resolving that Stratagem instead.
Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

loadout.en:
**The Steeljack Theyn is equipped with:** heavy volkanite disintegrator; plasma knife; preymark crest.
**Every Ironkin Steeljack is equipped with:** heavy volkanite disintegrator; plasma knife.

wargear.en: The Steeljack Theyn’s heavy volkanite disintegrator and plasma knife can be replaced with 1 Autoch‑pattern bolter and 1 plasma sword.

fluff.en: Gifted by the Votann with innate martial talents, Ironkin Steeljacks are natural soldiers. They can anchor entire battle lines, shrugging off enemy firepower that would fell lesser Kin. When on the offensive, they unleash precision salvoes of searing volkanite beams that scour chosen foes from sites of value to their kindred.

description.en: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) that is within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.
Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

loadout.en:
**The Steeljack Theyn is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolter; plasma sword; preymark crest.
**Every Ironkin Steeljack is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolter; plasma sword.

wargear.en: Any number of models in this unit can each have their plasma sword replaced with 1 concussion gauntlet.

fluff.en: When equipped with oversized plasma swords or concussion gauntlets to match their larger frames, Ironkin Steeljacks excel as piledriving shock troops. Such squads can smash breaches in enemy lines, pulverise the foe’s elite infantry and tear holes in armoured plating and monstrous flesh alike.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.
Once per phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit destroys an enemy unit. If it does, you gain 1YP.
While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Autoch-pattern combi-bolter; forgewrought plasma axe; rampart crest.

wargear.en: This model’s rampart crest can be replaced with 1 teleport crest.
This model’s forgewrought plasma axe can be replaced with 1 mass gauntlet.
This model’s Autoch-pattern combi-bolter can be replaced with 1 volkanite disintegrator.

fluff.en: Most oathbands are led by a Kâhl, whose strategic wisdom, determination and martial might inspire their warriors. Kâhls are often equipped with potent weapons and teleportation technologies, the better to lead the fight from the front and bring down the deadliest foes.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **EINHYR HEARTHGUARD** ■ **HEARTHKYN WARRIORS**

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
The bearer has the **SMOKE** keyword.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** magna‑coil autocannon; twin magna‑coil autocannon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 smoke launcher.

fluff.en: A variant of the adaptable Kapricus design, the Carrier provides elite teams of Hernkyn Yaegirs with the means to penetrate enemy lines at speed. The transport’s quad magna‑coils grant it the manoeuvrability to traverse almost any frontier terrain. At the same time, its banks of scanner uplinks enable it to lay down withering hails of accurate, suppressive fire to purge claim sites.

transport.en:
This model has a transport capacity of 5 **HERNKYN YAEGIR** models.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **HERNKYN YAEGIR** unit from your army that has not been split. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this **TRANSPORT**; the other can start the battle embarked within another **TRANSPORT**, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.
The bearer has the **SMOKE** keyword.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** magna‑rail cannon; twin magna‑coil autocannon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each be equipped with 1 smoke launcher.
Any number of models in this unit can each have their magna‑rail cannon replaced with 1 HYLas rotary cannon.

fluff.en: Kapricus Defenders are swift, magna‑coil scouting engines. Heavily armed, some carry magna‑rail cannons that can annihilate battle tanks many times the Defender’s mass. Others carry rapid‑firing rotary cannons, which, paired with a Defender’s magna‑coil autocannons, enable their Hernkyn crew to scythe through enemy infantry to support Kin advances.

description.en: At the end of your Command phase, before you determine if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition or Fortify Takeover, for each objective marker you control that has one or more models with this ability within range of it, you can spend 1YP or gain 1YP.
Once per battle round, when you target this unit with the **Fire Overwatch**/**Heroic Intervention stratagem**, you can use this ability. If you do, that use of that **stratagem** is -1 CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Autoch‑pattern bolt pistol; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Memnyr Strategists are superlative martial tacticians. They offer tactical insights to outmanoeuvre the foe and map the enemy’s vulnerabilities. They can extrapolate a foe’s plans so well that their advice borders supernatural precognition, enabling the Kin to strike devastating blows when least expected.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **IRONKIN STEELJACKS WITH HEAVY VOLKANITE DISINTEGRATORS** ■ **IRONKIN STEELJACKS WITH MELEE WEAPONS**

description.en: Units can disembark from this **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** HYLas beam cannon; twin bolt cannon; armoured wheels.

wargear.en: This model’s HYLas beam cannon can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 L7 missile launcher and 1 Sagitaur missile launcher ◦ 1 MATR autocannon

fluff.en: Designed to survive the worst that hostile worlds and alien predators can throw at it, the Sagitaur is a rugged ATV ideally suited to scouting operations and swift, armoured offensives. Sagitaurs mount a remarkable amount of firepower for their size and can even knock out enemy battle tanks.

transport.en:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 **LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **ARTILLERY,** **EXOARMOUR**, **EXOFRAME** or **IRONKIN STEELJACKS** models.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **HEARTHKYN WARRIORS** unit from your army that has not been split. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this **TRANSPORT**; the other can start the battle embarked within another **TRANSPORT**, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

description.en: Once per turn, you can spend 1YP to change one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

Once per battle round, when a friendly **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** volkanite disintegrator; Blade of the Ancestors; rampart crest.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Already one of the most accomplished heroes of the Kin, Kâhl Ûthar the Destined is marked for a truly vaunted fate. Few can assess the foe as swiftly or mercilessly as Ûthar. Once he has the measure of his enemies, he soon cuts them to pieces with the glowing Blade of the Ancestors.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **EINHYR HEARTHGUARD** ■ **HEARTHKYN WARRIORS**
